productDisplayName: Myntra Men Blue Banana Diet T-shirt
description: Style Note Spun from our irresistibly soft cotton, this is a blissfully cosy T-shirt. Sporting a print on the chest, this tee from myntra gives a fresh twist to an off-duty staple making it ideal for your cool summer wardrobe. Style it with shorts or jeans, understated accessories and lace up casual shoes for perfect man-about-town nonchalance Product Details Light blue T-shirt has a round neck, short sleeves and has graphic print on the front Material and Care 100% cotton Wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, soak or wring Warm iron on reverse Size and Fit Regular The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
